effect.extraeffects.flight.description: Grants creative flight. Higher levels provide faster flying speed.
effect.extraeffects.block_reach.descript: Allows mining & placing blocks farther away. Higher levels increase interaction distance.
effect.extraeffects.entity_reach.descrip: Allows hitting or otherwise interaction with entities from farther away. Higher levels increase interaction distance.
effect.extraeffects.unimpeded.descriptio: Removes the movement/jump/damage penalties from blocks like Sweet Berry Bushes, Magma, Cobwebs, etc.
